grade_notes: Summary successfully meets all criteria. Uses simple child-friendly language with analogies (super smart helper, smartest friend, learning to recognize faces). Accurately covers what GPT-4 is, what it can do (text/images, exams, writing, medical/legal domains), safety efforts, and limitations. Engaging conversational tone with questions and warmth. File created with correct name and 281 words (within 200-400 range). No technical jargon used.
